title: Schizeilema fragoseum

The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. taxonomy: Schizeilema fragoseum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is often found in wetlands and swamps. The family Restionaceae is a group of plants commonly known as restio plants, which are native to the Southern Hemisphere.
